ab: Laqi ku Seejiq Balay ka yaku.
Niqan rima hiyi ka tnsapah mu.
en: There are five people in our family.
There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: Gisu ku tuhuy mniq tama, bubu, qbsuran snaw ni qbsuran qrijil.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: Bowqax bi ka tama mu, key-sa-cu ka tama mu.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: Hlawax ka bubu mu, empsapuh ka bubu mu.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: Mniq sapah o skari kari Seejiq rmngaw mnan ka tama.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the ethnic language with us at home.

ab: Msangay rbagan o ida nami musa alang.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: Yaku ni qbsuran o tuhuy qmraq qpatur.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Kuxul mu bi ka tnsapah mu.
en: I like our family very much.
